name_cn:
MIUMIU Arcadie Matelassé
Sheepskin Bowling Bag Small Tote
Cognac
「Warm Brown Tones, Winter Luxury Choice」
When rich cognac meets classic Matelassé quilting, this bag instantly becomes the textural core of your autumn and winter wardrobe➰
「Craftsmanship Details, Full Texture」
▫️ 3D Quilting|Textured finish, full retro vibes
▫️ Leather Handle|Comfortable grip, elegant hand-carry
▫️ Detachable Strap|Switch between hand and shoulder carry〰️
▫️ Gold Hardware|Warm luster, complements the brown tones
▫️ Brand Logo|Classic fashion, unmistakable identity
▫️ Zipper + Lined Pocket|Secure storage, organized on the go
▫️ Bottom Studs|Thoughtful protection, more durable daily
——
From texture to accessories, everything adds elegance to your daily life✨
🔍Size:19*13*6cm
📌Model:5BB123M1200
